name: Another World RPG (Isekai'd)
description:
I also stumbled into the isekai ditch, let's see what comes out of it, I have to say it's not bad, but I hope to have your feedback.

I put a leveling system,

acquisitions of skills and spells, I also wanted to add a bit of comedy, so the bot could give you skills and spells that are a bit useless and comical, like: water jet: bird fountain, etc, but obviously there are the serious ones.

Adventurer's Guilds, Dungeons, quest and much more, full of adventure.

I hope you like it, let me know what you think.

don't forget to use the chat memory to save what interests you most.
creator: Gallicus
